title: Anatomy of a Typical IoT Board
description: A labeled diagram showing the key hardware components of a microcontroller board used in IoT applications and their interconnections.
relationships: Power Supply provides energy to all components
MCU is the central brain connected to all other elements
Communication Module connects the board to the internet/network
I/O Pins interface with external Sensors & Actuators
MCU reads from/writes to Memory for data and program storage

visuals.title: About The Board
visuals.description: IoT Board Annotated Layout - covering processor, memory, communication module, GPIO header, USB/HDMI ports, power input, and board comparison
